The Brew Lab.

Multi-tenant café operations platform — order, fulfil, and run head office. Pick a surface to explore.

Customer app (PWA)

Phone+OTP login, menu, cart, UPI checkout, order tracking, loyalty.

Installable

POS + KDS

Counter order entry and the live Kitchen Display Screen.

Live demo

Global admin

Head-office: org/catalog/RBAC/loyalty/procurement/reporting/privacy.

Self-contained demo on GitHub Pages — the customer app and POS/KDS run on seeded in-memory data, no backend needed. Auth: any phone, OTP 000000.
